tasks.label: Run feedback tests
tasks.command: cargo test -p nexa-core -- test_feedback_boosts test_feedback_penalizes test_apply_feedback_reranking_direct test_feedback_adjustment_clamped 2>&1

tasks.label: Run feedback tests (retry)
tasks.command: Remove-Item d:\coder\self-reply\target\debug\deps\nexa_core-ba1817ef6c7753ff.exe -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; cargo test -p nexa-core -- test_feedback_boosts test_feedback_penalizes test_apply_feedback_reranking_direct test_feedback_adjustment_clamped 2>&1

tasks.label: Kill & rerun tests
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM nexa_core-ba1817ef6c7753ff.exe 2>$null; Start-Sleep 1; cargo test -p nexa-core -- test_feedback_boosts test_feedback_penalizes test_apply_feedback_reranking_direct test_feedback_adjustment_clamped 2>&1

tasks.label: Kill all & rerun
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM nexa_core-ba1817ef6c7753ff.exe 2>$null; taskkill /F /IM nexa_core-4e8d5cf5606cd93e.exe 2>$null; Start-Sleep 2; cargo test -p nexa-core -- test_feedback_boosts test_feedback_penalizes test_apply_feedback_reranking_direct test_feedback_adjustment_clamped 2>&1

tasks.label: Run feedback tests (fix)
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM nexa_core-ba1817ef6c7753ff.exe 2>$null; Start-Sleep 1; cargo test -p nexa-core -- test_feedback_boosts test_feedback_penalizes test_apply_feedback_reranking_direct test_feedback_adjustment_clamped 2>&1

tasks.label: Kill all processes & test
tasks.command: Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'nexa_core' } | Stop-Process -Force 2>$null; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -eq 'cargo' } | Stop-Process -Force 2>$null; Start-Sleep 3; cargo test -p nexa-core -- test_feedback_boosts test_feedback_penalizes test_apply_feedback_reranking_direct test_feedback_adjustment_clamped 2>&1

tasks.label: Full test suite
tasks.command: Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'nexa_core' } | Stop-Process -Force 2>$null; Start-Sleep 2; cargo test -p nexa-core 2>&1
